evals.prompt: Create a segment for mobile users in my CJA data view
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) check for existing similar segments (Mobile Visitors already exists — present it for review), (2) clarify scope (visitor-level), (3) resolve Device Type dimension (variables/device_type) with value 'Mobile Phone' using streq-in predicate, (4) present proposed definition for user approval, (5) call upsertSegment with correct streq-in syntax, (6) run a validation report with the new segment ID returning non-zero visitor counts.

evals.prompt: Build a segment for visitors who came from paid search channels
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) search findSegments for existing paid search segments, (2) resolve the Marketing Channel dimension (variables/marketing_channel) and search for 'Paid Search' items via searchDimensionItems, (3) propose a visitor-scope segment using streq-in with the correct channel value(s), (4) present a plain-language summary for approval (e.g. 'Visitor where Marketing Channel = Paid Search'), (5) call upsertSegment with valid definition, (6) validate with runReport returning non-zero data.

evals.prompt: Make a segment for users who purchased — I want to target people who completed a checkout
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) check for existing purchaser segments via findSegments (e.g. 'Purchasers'), (2) resolve the Orders or Commerce Purchases metric (metrics/orders_1_1 or metrics/commerce.purchases.value), (3) propose a visitor-scope segment where Orders > 0 using greater-than predicate, (4) optionally suggest naming it 'Purchasers' or 'Customers with Orders', (5) confirm with user before calling upsertSegment, (6) validate with runReport showing non-zero purchaser counts.
